name: Ismail Alfarooque Wooden Industries
summary: Advanced architectural wood manufacturing for fire-rated doors, cabinets, joinery, veneer work, cladding, counters, and custom interiors.
hero: Architectural wood manufacturing with industrial precision.

sections.title: Manufacturing capabilities
sections.body: Automated cutting, edge finishing, sanding, veneer preparation, hot pressing, boring, mortising, profiling, and installation support.

sections.title: Machinery and technology
sections.body: Production assets include SCM edge banding, throughfeed moulding, wide belt sanding, beam saw cutting, boring systems, ORMA hot presses, Centauro mortising, and Casati veneer preparation.

sections.title: Products
sections.body: Fire-rated doors, non-fire-rated doors, frames, wardrobes, cabinets, counters, wall cladding, office joinery, custom furniture, and hospitality fit-out elements.

sections.title: Quality standards
sections.body: BM TRADA Q-Mark fire-door capability, ISO-led quality practices, raw-material controls, stage inspections, and on-site installation coordination.

name: Jotun Rowad Alfa Paint Shop
summary: A Jotun paint retail experience built around PDF-sourced Majestic interior colours, Jotashield exterior colours, and Gardex premium gloss wood and metal colour systems.
hero: Jotun interior, exterior, wood, and metal colour systems.

sections.title: Majestic interior paints
sections.body: Perfect interior colours and premium interior paint systems including Majestic Sense, True Beauty Sheen, True Beauty Matt, Supreme Finish, and Majestic primers.

sections.title: Jotashield exterior protection
sections.body: Long-lasting exterior colours, Jotashield Flex for visible wall cracks, UV-protected colours, waterproof protection, and exterior primer/sealer systems.

sections.title: Gardex wood and metal colours
sections.body: Gardex Premium Gloss wood and metal colour solutions with low odour, optimized drying time, excellent colour last, weather resistance, anti fungal and anti rust benefits.

name: Rowad Alfa Saloon
summary: A premium grooming concept focused on precision hair services, beard care, hygiene, booking convenience, and polished customer experience.
hero: Modern grooming with a calm premium rhythm.

sections.title: Services
sections.body: Haircuts, styling, beard sculpting, hot towel preparation, grooming rituals, skincare finishing, and executive packages.

sections.title: Booking UI
sections.body: A digital booking interface presents services, time preferences, package options, and direct call or WhatsApp actions.

sections.title: Experience
sections.body: A refined service environment shaped by cleanliness, comfort, privacy, and consistent hospitality.

name: Rowad Alfa Car Accessories
summary: Automotive accessories, protection products, audio systems, technology installations, detailing support, and customization services.
hero: Accessories, protection, and upgrades for a sharper drive.

sections.title: Accessories catalog
sections.body: Interior accessories, organizers, lighting, exterior accents, protection products, and daily-use vehicle enhancements.

sections.title: Technology installations
sections.body: Audio components, subwoofer enclosures, wiring support, and practical in-car technology upgrades.

sections.title: Workshop capability
sections.body: Installation-led service for customers seeking better function, refined appearance, improved sound, and a more personal vehicle.
